zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: Alice於1570年7月2日出生在英國維爾爾迪斯波利。她於大約1596年與John Briant在英國波克夏結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1659年3月在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice于1570年7月2日出生在英国維爾爾迪斯波利。她于大约1596年与John Briant在英国波克夏结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1659年3月在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Alice was born on 2 July 1570, in Tisbury, Wiltshire, England. She married John Briant about 1596, in Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in March 1659, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice est née le 2 juillet 1570, à Tisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Briant environ 1596, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1659, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Alice wurde am 2. Juli 1570 in Tisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1596 in Berkshire, England John Briant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1659 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice è nata il il 2 luglio 1570 nel Tisbury, Wiltshire, England. Lei sposato John Briant circa 1596, nel Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1659, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Aliceは1570年7月2日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアティスブリーで生まれた。約1596年にイギリスバークシュアイアでJohn Briantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1659年3月にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice(은)는 1570년 7월 2일 영국 윌츠히르 티스버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1596년 영국 버크실르에서 John Briant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1659년 3월 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice nasceu em 2 de julho de 1570, em Tisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Briant aproximadamente 1596, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em março de 1659, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice родилась 2 июля 1570 г. в местности тисбури, уилцхир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Briant около 1596 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла марта 1659 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Alice nació el 2 de julio de 1570, en Tisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con John Briant aproximadamente 1596, en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1659, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
